body_txt: This index lists the various tropes directly related to (if not themselves subtypes of) the Mentor Archetype . See Index of Pupils and Protégés for the other side of the relationship.   Not all Mentors have the hero's best interests at heart, however...  And some mentors are just, bad at mentoring.   Susceptible to Rage Against the Mentor and the Mentor Occupational Hazard .
